cookiesNoticeText: In compliance with Article 22.2 of Law 34/2002, of July 11, on Services of the Information Society and Electronic Commerce, brian-novoa.com informs you, in this section, about the policy of collection and processing of cookies.
cookiesDescription: A cookie is a file that is downloaded to your computer upon accessing certain web pages. Cookies allow a website, among other things, to store and retrieve information about a user's browsing habits or their equipment, and, depending on the information they contain and the way in which they use their equipment, they can be used to recognize the user.
cookiesTypesTitle: WHAT TYPES OF COOKIES DOES THIS WEBSITE USE?
cookiesAnalysis: This website uses the following types of cookies: Analysis cookies: Those that, treated by us or by third parties, allow us to quantify the number of users and thus perform the measurement and statistical analysis of the use made by users of the offered service. To do this, we analyze your navigation on our website in order to improve the product or service offer we offer you.
cookiesTechnical: Technical cookies: These allow the user to navigate through the restricted area and use its different functions, such as carrying out the process of purchasing an item.
cookiesPersonalization: Personalization cookies: These allow the user to access the service with some general predefined characteristics based on a series of criteria in the user's terminal, such as the language or the type of browser through which they connect to the service.
cookiesAdvertising: Advertising cookies: Those that, treated by this website or by third parties, allow managing in the most efficient way possible the offer of the advertising spaces that are on the website, adapting the content of the advertisement to the content of the requested service or to the use that you make of our website. For this, we can analyze your browsing habits on the Internet and we can show you advertising related to your browsing profile.
cookiesBehavioralAdvertising: Behavioral advertising cookies: These are those that enable the management, in the most efficient way possible, of the advertising spaces that, where appropriate, the publisher has included in a web page, application or platform from which the requested service is provided. This type of cookies stores information on the behavior of visitors obtained through the continuous observation of their browsing habits, which allows developing a specific profile to display advertising based on it.
disableCookiesDescription: You can allow, block or delete the cookies installed on your computer by configuring the options of the browser installed on your computer.
disableCookiesBrowsers: In most web browsers the possibility of allowing, blocking or deleting the cookies installed on your computer is offered. Below you can access the configuration of the most common web browsers to accept, install or disable cookies: Set cookies in Google Chrome, Set cookies in Microsoft Internet Explorer, Set cookies in Mozilla Firefox, Set cookies in Safari(Apple).
thirdPartyCookiesDescription: This website uses third-party services to collect information for statistical purposes and use of the web. DoubleClick cookies are used to improve the advertising included in the website. They are used to target advertising based on content that is relevant to a user, thereby improving the quality of experience in using it.
specificThirdPartyCookies: Specifically, we use Google Adsense and Google Analytics services for our statistics and advertising. Some cookies are essential to the functionality of the site, for example, the built-in search.
thirdPartyFunctionalities: Our site includes other functionalities provided by third parties. You can easily share content on social networks such as Facebook, Twitter, or Google +, with the buttons we have included for that purpose.
cookiesWarningDescription: You can delete and block all cookies from this site, but part of the site will not work or the quality of the webpage may be affected.
cookiesPolicyInquiries: If you have any doubts about our cookies policy, you can contact this website through our contact channels.
PLDescription: "Profit&Lost" is a web application designed to revolutionize the way people manage their personal finances. It is proposed as an intuitive and easy-to-use solution, allowing users to have simpler and more effective control over their income, expenses, and savings.
PLfrontendDescription: For the frontend, HTML, CSS, and TypeScript have been used within the React.js environment.
PLbackendDescription: For the backend, the choice has been Node.js, and the database is managed with MongoDB.
PLdeploymentDescription: Deployment is done on Hostinger, and through GitHub Actions, it is achieved that every time a code update is pushed, we have an automatic deployment so that the user has the most updated version available.
WPDescription: I have created customized websites using Wordpress and a variety of plugins for specific functionalities. For visual design, I employ Photoshop and Illustrator, complemented with my own CSS code for unique customization and style.
